hero.title: Stop Overpaying for Automation. Build Without Limits.
hero.subtitle: We are FOUNRS, the expert n8n agency for founders and operators. We replace your expensive and restrictive Zapier/Make workflows with powerful, scalable, and cost-effective automation foundations.
hero.socialProof: Trusted by teams using HubSpot, Webflow, Airtable, and more.

problemSolution.title: Tired of Hitting Walls with "No-Code" Tools?
problemSolution.subtitle: Most businesses are trapped in expensive, restrictive automation platforms. There's a better way to build your operational foundation.

problems.title: High monthly bills that scale unpredictably
problems.description: Task limits force you into expensive plans as you grow

problems.title: Restrictive task limits
problems.description: Hit arbitrary limits just when your business needs automation most

problems.title: Lack of control over your data
problems.description: Your business logic and data flow through third-party servers

problems.title: Inability to handle complex, multi-step logic
problems.description: Simple triggers and actions can't handle real business complexity

solutions.title: Predictable, lower costs with open-source n8n
solutions.description: Self-host or use managed hosting - either way, you control costs

solutions.title: Full data privacy with self-hosting options
solutions.description: Keep sensitive business data on your own infrastructure

solutions.title: Limitless flexibility for custom logic and APIs
solutions.description: Handle any business logic with JavaScript and custom functions

solutions.title: A scalable system that grows with you
solutions.description: No arbitrary limits - scale your workflows as your business grows

whyFounrs.title: We're Not Just Coders, We're Strategic Builders.
whyFounrs.description: FOUNRS was founded by a builder, for builders. We've experienced the frustration of hitting walls with inflexible tools firsthand. That's why we don't just 'connect apps'—we architect robust operational foundations using the limitless power of n8n. We treat your business as if it were our own.

logoWall.title: The Building Blocks of Modern Operations
logoWall.subtitle: We're experts in the technologies that power modern businesses. Whatever tools you use, we can connect them seamlessly.
logoWall.bottomText: And 50+ more integrations. If it has an API, we can connect it.

howItWorks.title: Our Path to Your Operational Freedom
howItWorks.subtitle: A strategic 3-step approach that transforms your business from reactive operations to proactive automation leadership.

steps.title: Map Your Vision
steps.description: We start with a deep-dive strategy session to understand not just your current processes, but your future goals. We identify the highest-impact automation opportunities.

steps.title: Build Your Foundation
steps.description: Our experts design and build your custom n8n workflows, creating a robust and scalable automation engine at the core of your business.

steps.title: Empower Your Team
steps.description: We deliver a fully-tested system, provide comprehensive training, and offer ongoing support to ensure you get the maximum value from your investment.

items.quote: With PRISMR, operational friction vanished and our team’s throughput soared.
items.author: John Smith

items.quote: Our error rate decreased by 95%, customer satisfaction increased.
items.author: Sarah Johnson

items.question: What tools do you use?
items.answer: We integrate n8n, Zapier, Make, WhatsApp Cloud API, Google Workspace, HubSpot, Supabase and many other popular tools.

items.question: Do you provide maintenance and support?
items.answer: Yes, we have monthly maintenance packages and SLA options. We provide 24/7 technical support.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: It varies between 2-8 weeks depending on project complexity. We share a detailed timeline in the discovery meeting.

items.question: Is it compatible with our existing systems?
items.answer: Yes, we provide integration without disrupting your existing systems. We establish secure connections through APIs.

hero.title: Our n8n Services
hero.subtitle: From complete Zapier migrations to custom-built operational foundations, we are your strategic automation partner.

services.title: Custom Workflow Development
services.description: For businesses that need a powerful automation foundation built from scratch. We design and implement tailor-made n8n workflows that perfectly match your unique processes.
deliverables: A crystal-clear map of your new, efficient workflow
A scalable automation engine built for your future growth
Seamless integration with your entire tech stack, including custom APIs
Full documentation and team training for a confident handover

services.title: Zapier & Make Migration
services.description: Escape the high costs and limitations. We seamlessly migrate all your existing Zaps and Scenarios to a more powerful, scalable, and cost-effective n8n setup with zero downtime.
deliverables: A clear audit showing exactly where you're losing money and time
A zero-downtime migration plan for a completely seamless switch
A clear projection of your monthly savings and long-term ROI
Enhanced workflows that outperform your old setup from day one

services.title: Managed n8n & Consulting
services.description: Your dedicated, on-demand automation partner. We set up, host, and maintain your n8n instance, and provide ongoing strategic consulting to continuously optimize your operations.
deliverables: Peace of mind with secure, fully-managed n8n hosting and maintenance
An expert partner, always on-call to optimize your operations
Proactive 24/7 monitoring and detailed performance reports
A long-term strategic partnership focused on your success

bottomSection.title: Every Great Foundation Starts with a Blueprint.
bottomSection.description: Our initial strategy call is designed to give you clarity. We'll help you identify the right path forward, whether you're starting from scratch, migrating from another platform, or looking for an expert partner.

hero.title: A Partnership in Your Growth, Not Just a Line on Your Invoice.
hero.subtitle: We believe in transparent, value-based pricing. Our solutions are priced as strategic investments designed to deliver a significant return, not as a commodity cost. You won't find hourly rates here—you'll find a clear path to ROI.

philosophy.title: Our Pricing Is Built on Three Core Principles
philosophy.subtitle: These principles ensure you receive maximum value from every dollar invested in your automation foundation.

cards.title: No "One-Size-Fits-All" Packages
cards.headline: Custom Solutions, Custom Pricing
cards.description: Your business is unique. Your automation foundation should be too. Every project is scoped and priced based on its specific complexity, goals, and the value it will create for your business.

cards.title: We Focus on Your ROI
cards.headline: Focus on Return on Investment (ROI)
cards.description: Our primary goal is to build systems that save you money, reduce errors, and free up your team's time. We structure our proposals to show you a clear path to a positive return on your investment.

cards.title: 100% Transparent Proposals
cards.headline: Full Transparency
cards.description: After our initial strategy call, you will receive a detailed, fixed-price proposal. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. You'll know the full investment upfront.
